title: Mob Dispencers 🐸
description: Expand Mob Farming With Mob Dispencers. Redstone Ready? (77 Mob Dispencers)
body:
**Mob Dispencers** is a minecraft java mod that adds a total of ( **76** ) new dispensers to your minecraft server. With these dispensers you can make farming mobs 10 times easier than before.
You can activate the dispensers with: levers, redstone, or other redstone systems.

![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beed816e863b2943e65d93d8015d916dd017b1f3.gif)

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a7c5e23733899c152a84b95b2f07bafa8f92364.jpeg)

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8d1c0609612aa574d48d11fcaab732efef525d3.png)

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5accfbde12209fdbbd6d5ee20d8288a095f31caa.png)
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d78c482d80ae752f56bcea040a52fe950754124.png)

![mod info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6684d56873b05979beee6383f72bd67da396efa.png)

This mod is fully compatible with other mods. Quark, Mob Grinding Utils, etc

This mod also adds ( 2 ) secret mobs to your game.
1 - Giant zombie 2 - Illusioner

![illusinor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a167dc95c9b3d98a0623e8cd02ae776493b6fe26.png)
![giant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2224a8b6cb25b8d59b94600710f62e7f4c029be6.png)

![crating](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b7710bedeeaf8fd0950879c4896040c8c1faeb.png)
![papers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4838ab47aa1fe7237aa205382662f43f7d03ebc.png)

These items (papers) are needed to make the dispensers. This way we make sure that other mods don't block our recipes
![1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d8293f0766f650612c2a642591755c564edcd60.png)

Breeze, Bogged, Creaking, Happy ghast, Are only available for the versions above ( 1.21 )

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
